# claudeplatform_workspace (Resource)

A Claude platform workspace. Destroy archives the workspace (soft delete); the Admin API has no hard delete.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "claudeplatform_workspace" "ml_team" {
  name = "ml-team"

  tags = {
    team        = "ml"
    cost-center = "research"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Human-readable workspace name.

### Optional

- `tags` (Map of String) User-defined tags. Keys may not begin with "anthropic".

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) RFC 3339 creation timestamp.
- `display_color` (String) Hex color representing the workspace in the Console.
- `id` (String) Workspace ID (wrkspc_...).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import using the workspace ID (wrkspc_...).
terraform import claudeplatform_workspace.ml_team wrkspc_01WgQMyXabc123
```
